titles.title: New Spawn
titles.trial: Learn the controls: create tiny C++ repos, build them cleanly, and prove them with GitHub.

titles.title: C++ Recruit
titles.trial: Ship a clean CMake C++ utility with README, screenshot/output proof, and release tag.

titles.title: SDL Apprentice
titles.trial: Ship an SDL app with window, rendering, input, delta time, and clean shutdown.

titles.title: Junior Gameplay Engineer
titles.trial: Build a complete SDL mini-game with enemies, collision, score, restart, README, screenshot/video, and release.

titles.title: ECS Engineer
titles.trial: Build an ECS sandbox with entity inspector, spawn/destroy, components, systems, and debug output.

titles.title: Tools Engineer
titles.trial: Build an internal developer tool with persistence, logs, useful UI, and clean release.

titles.title: Simulation Engineer
titles.trial: Build a deterministic simulation with fixed timestep, pause, step-frame, replay, and telemetry.

titles.title: Senior C++ Engineer
titles.trial: Ship a polished C++/SDL/ECS project with clean architecture, tests, tools, docs, and release.

titles.title: Engine Architect
titles.trial: Build a modular engine core with asset pipeline, profiling, and stable APIs.

titles.title: Staff Systems Builder
titles.trial: Build an integrated multi-system application with tools, telemetry, configs, and strong docs.

classes.name: Military Systems Dev
classes.summary: Ada, C++, Linux, GUIs, telemetry, message parsing, simulation, fault injection, sustainment.

classes.name: Game Dev
classes.summary: SDL, rendering, input, collision, ECS, animation, audio, game loops, playable demos.

classes.name: Linux Toolsmith
classes.summary: Bash, Python, /proc, /sys, system inventory, logs, monitors, install scripts.

zones.name: The Compiler Yard
zones.summary: The starting yard. Learn clean folders, CMake, tiny C++ programs, README proof, and GitHub releases.

zones.name: The Broken Build Mine
zones.summary: First dungeon. Rooms teach clean builds. Boss proves you can clone, build, run, and release.

zones.name: SDL Fields
zones.summary: Window, renderer, input events, textures, delta time.

zones.name: The Input Marsh
zones.summary: Capture and control input from keyboard, mouse, and controllers. Bind actions. Save configs.

zones.name: Goblin Arena
zones.summary: Junior title dungeon. Prove you can build a complete SDL mini-game.

zones.name: ECS Catacombs
zones.summary: Entity IDs, components, systems, storage, debug inspectors.

zones.name: Message Bus Depot
zones.summary: Message parsing, fake bus traffic, telemetry tables, invalid-message detection.

zones.name: Toolmaker's Valley
zones.summary: Debug panels, config tools, log viewers, release helpers.

zones.name: Simulation Highlands
zones.summary: Fixed timestep, replay, telemetry, deterministic behavior, fault scenarios.

zones.name: Senior Citadel
zones.summary: Senior-level capstone territory. Large integrated projects only.

quests.name: Hello C++ Campfire
quests.summary: Create your first proof repo: a tiny C++ program that prints a useful status message and builds cleanly.
requirements: Create a GitHub repo named codequest-001-hello-cpp
Print your name, quest number, and current class goal
Add a README with build/run commands
Build and run it from a clean terminal
Paste console output into the quest submission

quests.name: Clean CMake Outpost
quests.summary: Turn the tiny C++ app into a clean CMake project that builds from a fresh clone.
requirements: README includes mkdir build, cmake .., make, run command
Submit GitHub repo and console output

quests.name: Argument Goblin
quests.summary: Add command line arguments so your program can run in different modes.
requirements: Submit console output for each mode

quests.name: File Scroll Cache
quests.summary: Read and write a tiny progress file so the app remembers something between runs.
requirements: README explains where the file is saved

quests.name: Dungeon Boss: The Broken Build Mine
quests.summary: Ship a clean C++ utility from a fresh clone with README, release tag, and console proof.
requirements: Submit repo link and console output

quests.name: SDL Window Gate
quests.summary: Open an SDL window, clear the screen, handle quit, and close cleanly.

quests.name: Keyboard Event Logger
quests.summary: Build an SDL app that logs every key press and release with keycode, scancode, and modifier state.

quests.name: Bus Monitor Demo
quests.summary: Create fake message traffic, parse messages, detect invalid messages, and show traffic in a GUI table.

quests.name: Linux Inventory Vault
quests.summary: Optional profession quest: report CPU, RAM, disks, serial numbers where available, GPU, network interfaces, and export JSON.

gear.name: Wooden Pointer
gear.effect: Unlocks the next beginner C++ quest.

gear.name: Ring of Clean Build
gear.effect: Unlocks build command cards and clean-clone proof checklist.

gear.name: C++ Recruit Medal
gear.effect: Unlocks SDL Fields and the C++ Recruit title.

gear.name: SDL Blade
gear.effect: Unlocks SDL rendering and input quest chains.

gear.name: Command Window Hotkey
gear.effect: Unlocks Ctrl+K command palette as earned loot.

gear.name: Bus Analyzer
gear.effect: Unlocks message parsing, 1553-style scheduler, and bus-monitor quests.

gear.name: Staff of Deterministic Time
gear.effect: Unlocks replay, pause-step, telemetry, and deterministic simulation trials.

activity.reward: No XP yet. First proof required.

veteran_deeds.name: ThinMon
veteran_deeds.summary: Can later become a proven Linux Toolsmith quest if moved into a clean repo with README, screenshot, and release.

veteran_deeds.name: MBIL Prototype
veteran_deeds.summary: Can later become a Military Systems Dev capstone path with bus, telemetry, faults, and simulation proof.

veteran_deeds.name: PlantSimulator
veteran_deeds.summary: Can later become a Web Tool Dev / Systems Tool quest chain.

veteran_deeds.name: TrinityCore Launcher
veteran_deeds.summary: Can later become a Toolmaker quest with build/run panels and release notes.

veteran_deeds.name: Linux Utility Scripts
veteran_deeds.summary: Can later become Linux Toolsmith dungeon proof.
